key_facts: Founded January 2015 by 22-year-old dropout Ding Yibo
Revenue: CNY 100M (2015) → CNY 300M (2016) in first 2 years
Filed for Shenzhen Stock Exchange IPO in February 2023
O&M services covering 4.5 GW across 19 provinces
Covers distributed EPC + O&M without panel/inverter manufacturing

funding_history.notes: Pure-play independent installer — no parent conglomerate; IPO is primary exit event

business_model_notes: Traditional EPC + O&M model for distributed residential and C&I solar, operating without manufacturing vertical integration. Revenue: installation contracts (EPC) + annual O&M fees on 4.5 GW under management. Founder Ding Yibo's youth-entrepreneurship story garnered significant media attention and early brand awareness.
competitive_position: Key pure-play independent in residential installation segment. IPO filing at CNY 650M target positions it as mid-tier vs Chint Anneng's CNY 36–60B valuation. Significant because it shows the ceiling for independent installers without OEM parent support.
research_notes: High confidence. IPO filing documents are public record (SZSE). Revenue figures from 21Jingji article 2023-09-20. Founder background well-documented in Chinese media.
